legacy.content:
# Phase 33 Context: Unified Space Model and Behavior Analysis
## Why this phase exists
Current space modeling is strong for static content vectors, but we need a broader ontology:
- Multiple spaces (content, event, room, level, entity, effect) - Shared dimensions reused across spaces - Effects that include both stat deltas and runtime behaviors over time - Explorer controls for both static vectors and timeline-based behavior similarity
## Direction
- No standalone "trait space" as a product concept. - Traits/features are canonical dimensions reused inside other spaces. - Event space becomes first-class in reports and explorer views. - Behavior effects are modeled with short timeline signatures in addition to scalar deltas.
